title: Run npm audit fix in dashboard and capture remaining vulnerabilities

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Starting remediation workflow: create branch from develop, run npm audit fix in dashboard, then report what was auto-resolved vs what remains.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Executed first remediation step on branch chore/dashboard-audit-remediation: ran npm audit (baseline 106 vulnerabilities: 18 low, 61 moderate, 22 high, 5 critical), then npm audit fix. Result after fix: 66 vulnerabilities (17 low, 32 moderate, 15 high, 2 critical). Auto-fix modified dashboard/package-lock.json only; remaining findings are primarily transitive Amplify/AWS SDK, Next/PostCSS major-upgrade paths, and a few Storybook/JSDOM chains requiring reviewed version bumps.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Re-ran npm audit fix to confirm no further non-breaking auto-remediation remained. Vulnerability counts are unchanged at 66 total (17 low, 32 moderate, 15 high, 2 critical). Current code delta is limited to dashboard/package-lock.json.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Completed step 1: npm audit fix baseline pass and remaining-vulnerability capture.
